Convo STAY Al Lago - Lake STAY Accommodation in the Heart of ComoConvo STAY Al Lago is perfectly positioned on Via Benedetto e Antonio Maria Crespi in Como, Italy, just moments from the shimmering shores of Lake Como. Situated within the charming Como city centre, our property offers travellers contemporary comfort in a friendly and relaxed environment. With cobblestone streets, cosy cafés, boutique shops, and the lively Lungolago lakeside promenade just steps away, guests can easily explore the authentic charm and beauty of Lake Como on foot.Offering 21 thoughtfully designed rooms and family rooms, Convo STAY Al Lago provides practical and comfortable Como accommodation for couples, families, and leisure travellers. Each room includes essential modern amenities and free WiFi, ensuring a convenient and enjoyable stay near many of Lake Como's top attractions.Our prime location places you only a 4-minute walk from Como Lago Train Station, with seamless access to ferries, buses, and local public transport. From here, guests can quickly reach popular landmarks such as the Basilica of San Fedele, the Cathedral of Como (Duomo di Como), the Voltiano Temple, the Funicolare Como-Brunate, and the scenic Lake Como waterfront. Whether you're planning lakeside walks, sunset views, or activities such as kayaking, canoeing, or boat tours, everything is within easy reach.At Convo STAY Al Lago, we focus on delivering a smooth and comfortable guest experience. Enjoy contactless check-in/check-out, helpful concierge support, luggage storage, and a welcoming lounge area-perfect for unwinding after a day of exploring Como and Lake Como.Whether you're planning a cultural getaway, a family holiday, or a scenic escape, Convo STAY Al Lago offers modern, convenient, and well-connected accommodation in one of Northern Italy's most captivating lake destinations.
